name: Red Oak Luxury Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Leros Transportation Group (acquired Red Oak Transportation in 2022; merged into Leros HQ in Valhalla, NY)
principals: Historically Stoppelmann family (Andrew Stoppelmann - CEO; Edward Stoppelmann - President; 3rd-generation operators dating to 1937 NYC taxi roots)
districts_or_customers: Corporate, leisure, wedding/event clients in Westchester, NYC, CT, NJ; NYSDOT Performance-Based Bus Safety preferred operator; no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: 2022: Acquired by Leros Transportation Group (Westchester-based chauffeured ground transport consolidator); operations merged into Leros HQ in Valhalla, NY. Continues to operate under Red Oak brand under Leros umbrella.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Red Oak is a luxury/charter/limo operator (not a yellow school-bus contractor) and was acquired by Leros Transportation Group in 2022 - now part of a strategic ground-transport group. Pound Ridge address appears to be a satellite/owner-affiliated location; main ops at Port Chester/Valhalla.
